name: TitleMax Title Secured Loans
description_short: TitleMax offers title secured loans and personal loans with same-day cash, using your vehicle title as collateral and accepting most credit types.
description_long:
TitleMax is a national title lending chain with this Rock Hill, SC location at 1671 North Cherry Rd., Suite 101. The store serves the greater Rock Hill area and operates alongside additional South Carolina locations and partner stores. TitleMax provides both in-store and online loan processes, including a phone-based vehicle appraisal tool that allows borrowers to start applications remotely before visiting a store to sign documents and collect funds.

The store offers two distinct products. Title secured loans use the borrower's clear vehicle title as collateral — applicants must present the vehicle, a clear title, and a valid government-issued ID. Personal loans are unsecured and require a government ID plus an active bank statement from within the past 60 days, with a pay stub required if recurring deposits are not visible. Both products advertise quick approval, same-day cash, and acceptance of most credit types. A credit check is performed for both products.

Several features distinguish this TitleMax location. Bilingual staff is available, which serves a broader customer base in the Rock Hill market. The online title loan application allows borrowers to complete much of the process via smartphone, including vehicle photo submission for appraisal, before finalizing at a store. The store holds a 5.0 out of 5 average rating across 564+ Google reviews. Borrowers who take out a title loan retain use of their vehicle throughout the loan term.

TitleMax is a viable emergency cash option for vehicle owners who cannot qualify for conventional loans, but the model carries meaningful risk. The vehicle is pledged as collateral, meaning default can result in repossession. The store page does not disclose APR ranges, fee schedules, or loan term lengths — information a borrower needs to evaluate true cost. Title loans are widely documented as high-cost products. Borrowers should request full rate and fee disclosures before signing and confirm they can manage repayment to avoid losing their vehicle.
address: 1394 W O. Ezell Blvd, Spartanburg, SC 29301

company_info.headquarters: 1394 W O. Ezell Blvd, Spartanburg, SC 29301

pros: Same-day cash disbursement upon loan approval
Most credit types accepted — credit score is not the sole qualifier
Online title loan application with phone-based vehicle photo appraisal
Borrower keeps driving their vehicle during the loan term
5.0 out of 5 average rating across 564+ Google reviews
Two product options: collateral-backed title loan or unsecured personal loan
cons: No APR, fee, or loan term information disclosed on the store page
Vehicle is pledged as collateral — missed payments risk repossession
Clear vehicle title required with no existing liens — excludes financed vehicles
Credit check is still performed despite collateral-based underwriting
Store is closed Sundays, limiting same-day access on weekends
best_for: Vehicle owners with a clear, lien-free title who need cash same day
Borrowers with poor or limited credit who cannot qualify for bank loans
Spanish-speaking customers who prefer bilingual in-person service
Consumers facing unexpected expenses who want an unsecured personal loan alternative
diagnosis: TitleMax is best suited for vehicle owners with a paid-off car and a need for fast emergency cash who cannot access traditional credit. The main caveat is that the vehicle serves as collateral and can be repossessed upon default, and no rate or fee information is published — both hallmarks of high-cost title lending that borrowers should scrutinize carefully before committing.
services: Title secured loans (vehicle title as collateral)
In-store loan document signing and same-day cash disbursement
Online account management portal for title loans
Online account management portal for personal loans
Vehicle value assessment as part of loan underwriting
Referrals to nearby TitleMax branch locations
